summary: No-ship: R-1 remains unproven. R-2 through R-4, the Phase G rewrite, flip records, scope, and preservation audit exposed no additional blocker.

findings.title: Missing verification: required release-profile target
findings.body: The plan requires `cargo test --release --test reconcile_vanishing_entries` and identifies the two release commands as the sole control for profile bias (plan lines 2204-2206 and 2235). R-1 instead records the release repro target, so the required Phase E/T release integration witnesses were never captured. Both recorded `exit=` fields are also blank. Passing the repro and filtered lib tests does not cover this required risk surface.
findings.recommendation: At green.sha, capture both exact release commands specified by the plan, including complete raw output and numeric exit statuses, then commit the corrected R-1 evidence.

next_steps: Replace the R-1 transcript with script-captured output from the canonical release commands.
Repeat the release evidence audit after the corrected artifact is committed.
